title: The Simplers
description: This work-in-progress resource pack uses the current Minecraft and adds more of a Simplistic feel
body:
# The Simplers
Have you thought that Minecraft textures are way too complicated? Well, you are not alone. That is why this texture pack fixes your needs of simplism. All jokes aside. 
This pack uses some main colors and changes other pixels similar to it to give off a simple and possibly plastic feel to the game. 

---

![Picture of some of the textures](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2023/717/17281663_l.webp)

In a chance of a bug Please go to issues and comment on what is wrong. [Click Me](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/simplers/)
